name: SetMapObjectPosition
title: SetMapObjectPosition
syntax: long SetMapObjectPosition( long handle, float latitude1, float longitude1 ); // form 1
long SetMapObjectPosition( long handle, float latitude1, float longitude1, float latitude2, float longitude2 ); // form 2
description: Sets the GPS position of a map object either for one (form 1) or two (form 2) points.

parameters.name: latitude1
parameters.description: First latitude value of the map object to be drawn.

parameters.name: longitude1
parameters.description: Frst longitude value of the map object to be drawn.

parameters.name: latitude2
parameters.description: Second latitude value of the map object to be drawn (needed for drawing lines).

parameters.name: longitude2
parameters.description: Second longitude value of the map object to be drawn (needed for drawing lines).

return: Second latitude value of the map object to be
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
